evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Managing data quality, information security, and regulatory compliance
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Responsibilities emphasize quality, governance, and compliance—classic rigour signals with no velocity language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Managing data quality, information security, and regulatory compliance; business-critical analytics
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Explicitly framed as business-critical data with mandatory compliance and security requirements, signaling high-risk domain.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Snowflake platform; data modeling; reporting principles
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named data warehouse tool in responsibilities (Snowflake) and established data modeling practices suggest mid-stage maturity with some infrastructure in place.
evidence.jd_authorship: Developing logical and physical data models for analytics; Building data structures on the Snowflake platform; Establishing shared data modeling and reporting principles
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical responsibilities with named tools (Snowflake, Power BI, Data Vault) and concrete deliverables show hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: data modeling, processing, and ensuring usability
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Focus is on internal data infrastructure and self-serve analytics (reporting principles, modelling layer) rather than GTM, product, or finance.
evidence.autonomy_level: Establishing shared data modeling and reporting principles; Managing data quality
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Both strategic ownership verbs (establish, manage) and execution support (collaborating, translating) create mixed framing across infrastructure and stakeholder support.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools, LLM readiness, or AI-assisted work expected of the candidate.
evidence.testing_framing: Managing data quality, information security, and regulatory compliance
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality is framed as a named responsibility the candidate owns, without explicit testing frameworks or tool mention.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: business-critical analytics and reporting data; information security; regulatory compliance
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High framing: explicitly called 'business-critical' with mandatory compliance and security as primary concerns, not secondary operational reliability.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Establishing shared data modeling and reporting principles; Building data structures
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Establish and build verbs suggest creation/improvement of existing foundations rather than pure greenfield.
evidence.language_gate: Fluent Finnish and English (speaking and writing)
